zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois於1081年2月13日出生在法國皮卡迪奧易時，她的父親Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois24歲，母親Adélaïde de Vermandois22歲。她於1096年與Robert Beaumont在法國阿奎泰結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1131年2月13日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯享年50歲，埋葬在法國瑟-吉瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois于1081年2月13日出生在法国皮卡迪奧易时，她的父亲Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois24岁，母亲Adélaïde de Vermandois22岁。她于1096年与Robert Beaumont在法国阿奎泰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1131年2月13日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯享年50岁，埋葬在法国瑟-吉瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Capet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan and southern French: topographic name from canet (from Latin cannetum) ‘cane brake’, or a habitational name from Canet, the name of several places in Catalonia (Spain) and France, named with this word.
French: nickname meaning ‘little duck’ in Old French, perhaps applied to someone thought to resemble a duck in some way or to a dealer in poultry.

variants.name: Canete
meanings: Spanish (Cañete): habitational name (of the same etymology as Canet ) from any of the places called Cañete, especially Cañete de las Torres (Seville), Cañete la Real (Málaga) and Cañete (Cuenca).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois was born on 13 February 1081, in Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, was 24 and her mother, Adélaïde de Vermandois, was 22. She married Robert Beaumont in 1096, in Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 13 February 1131, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Seine-et-Oise, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois est née le 13 février 1081, à Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde de Vermandois, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Beaumont en 1096, à Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 février 1131, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Seine-et-Oise, France.

de.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois am 13. Februar 1081 in Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois 24 und ihre Mutter Adélaïde de Vermandois 22. Sie hat 1096 in Aquitaine, Frankreich Robert Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Februar 1131 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois è nata il il 13 febbraio 1081 nel Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Adélaïde de Vermandois, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert Beaumont nel 1096, nel Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 13 febbraio 1131, nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Seine-et-Oise, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandoisが1081年2月13日にフランスピカーディオイゼで生まれた時，父Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandoisは24歳，母Adélaïde de Vermandoisは22歳であった。1096年にフランスアクイティアインでRobert Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1131年2月13日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスで50歳で死去し，フランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼにて埋葬された。

ko.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois(이)가 1081년 2월 13일 프랑스 피카디 이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïde de Vermandois(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1096년 프랑스 아키테인에서 Robert Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1131년 2월 13일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인-트-이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois nasceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1081, em Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde de Vermandois, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Beaumont em 1096, em Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1131, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Seine-et-Oise, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois родилась 13 февраля 1081 г. в местности оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde de Vermandois, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Beaumont в 1096 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 13 февраля 1131 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности сине-ет-оис, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois nació el 13 de febrero de 1081, en Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Hugues Ier dit Hugues le Grand de Vermandois, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Adélaïde de Vermandois, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert Beaumont en 1096, en Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 13 de febrero de 1131, en Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Seine-et-Oise, Francia.
